notes: Official target success response is LZMA-compressed replay payload, not complete .osr bytes or a ZIP archive.
Manual rename of stored blob bytes to .osr is not a valid corruption proof.
Direct blob bytes are not implementation-ready until a local raw blob artifact is validated against the target body parser.
If local validation shows blob integrity pass but target body compatibility fail, #36 must assemble replay download response bytes instead of returning blob bytes directly.
